src/main/java/com/springmvc/springmongod.general_idea: Enable Spring Data MongoDB auditing to automatically manage creation and modification timestamps.
Register a ModelMapper bean with a custom converter to handle empty strings as nulls.
Added Apache Commons Lang3 dependency for string utilities and random generation.
Added ModelMapper dependency for object mapping between DTOs and entities.
Added SLF4J dependency for structured logging.
Added Bean Validation API dependency for input validation.
Switched from field injection to constructor injection for better testability and immutability.
Replaced deprecated Spring Data `findOne` with `findById` returning Optional to comply with modern Spring Data standards.
Implemented input validation using BindingResult to handle form errors gracefully.
Added automatic generation of a unique product code using secure random strings.
Added structured logging to track application flow and debug information.
Refactored controller methods to accept DTOs (ProductForm) instead of individual request parameters for cleaner code.
src/main/java/com/springmvc/springmongod.human_impl: public String save(@Valid ProductForm productForm, BindingResult bindingResult)

src/main/java/com/springmvc/springmongod.general_idea: Explicitly defined HTTP methods for endpoints to improve RESTful compliance and security.
Added a unique product identifier field 'prodId' with MongoDB indexing.
Added a unique index constraint to the 'prodName' field.
Changed price field type from Double to BigDecimal for precision.
Added version field for optimistic locking support.
Added creation date field for auditing.
Added last modified date field for auditing.
Changed field visibility from package-private to private for encapsulation.
Removed explicit constructors in favor of default no-arg constructor.
Updated author tag in class documentation.
Replaced the generic CrudRepository with MongoRepository to access MongoDB-specific features and remove deprecated methods.
Removed the deprecated findOne method which was overridden from CrudRepository.
Removed the explicit delete method override as it is already provided by the parent repository interface.
Added a derived query method to find the first product by name.
Added a derived query method to find a product by ID and name.
Added a custom native query method to find a product by name using JSON syntax.
Added a custom native query method to find products by name using regex.

src/test/java/com/springmvc/springmongod.general_idea: Replace JUnit 4 annotations and runner with JUnit 5 equivalents to align with modern testing standards.
src/test/java/com/springmvc/springmongod.human_impl: Replaced 'import org.junit.Test' with 'import org.junit.jupiter.api.Test' and removed '@RunWith(SpringRunner.class)'

src/test/java/com/springmvc/springmongod.general_idea: Rename the test class to match the new application class name.
Change test class and method visibility to package-private as per JUnit 5 conventions.
src/test/java/com/springmvc/springmongod.human_impl: Removed 'public' modifier from class and 'contextLoads' method

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Spring Boot parent from 1.5.7.RELEASE to 3.4.12 to support Java 21.
Set the target Java version property to 21.
Update project description and add SCM URL.
pom.xml.human_impl: <description>Demo project for Spring Boot with MongoDB</description><scm>...

pom.xml.general_idea: Reformat pom.xml indentation from tabs to spaces.
pom.xml.human_impl: Changed indentation style throughout the file.

src/main/resources/static/index.html.general_idea: Added lang attribute to html tag for better accessibility and standards compliance.
Added meta charset tag to ensure correct character encoding.
Included Bootstrap CSS via WebJars to modernize the UI styling.
Included a custom stylesheet for application-specific styling.
Wrapped main content in a Bootstrap container div for responsive layout.
Applied Bootstrap button classes to the product list link for better UX.

src/main/resources/templates/create.html.general_idea: Include Bootstrap 5.3.8 CSS via WebJars to modernize the UI styling.
Include a custom stylesheet for additional styling overrides.
Add a read-only input field for the product code (prodId) to the form.
src/main/resources/templates/create.html.human_impl: <input type="text" class="form-control" id="prodId" name="prodId" th:value="${productForm.prodId}" readonly="readonly"/>

src/main/resources/templates/create.html.general_idea: Bind the HTML form to the Thymeleaf model object 'productForm' for data population.
Update the form action to use Thymeleaf URL resolution instead of a static string.
Add error display logic for the product name field based on validation results.
Add error display logic for the product price field based on validation results.
Remove the 'btn-lg' class from the product list button to adjust sizing.

src/main/resources/templates/default.htm.general_idea: Upgrade Bootstrap CSS references from version 3.3.7 to 5.3.8 to align with modern frontend standards.
Reformat HTML indentation and attribute ordering for better readability and consistency.

src/main/resources/templates/edit.html.general_idea: Include Bootstrap 5.3.8 CSS via WebJars to modernize the UI styling.
Include a custom stylesheet for additional styling overrides.
Modernize the form action attribute to use Thymeleaf URL building instead of a static string.
Bind the form to a specific Thymeleaf object for better data handling and validation support.
Add a read-only input field for the product code/ID.
Update all form field value bindings to reference the new productForm object instead of the old product object.
Add UI feedback for validation errors on the product name field.
Add UI feedback for validation errors on the product price field.
Remove the 'btn-lg' class from the product list button to adjust sizing.

src/main/resources/templates/product.htm.general_idea: Include Bootstrap 5.3.8 CSS via WebJars to modernize the UI styling.
Include a custom stylesheet for additional styling overrides.
Add a 'Code' column to the product table to display the product ID.
